# Heavy-lifecycle self-trigger. Put ONE pytest -k filter on the first
# non-comment line to run that heavy lifecycle on the next push (CI turns on
# SCP_RUN_HEAVY automatically). Comment it out / empty the file to disable.
# Options: compute-virtualserver-full | database-mysql-cluster | container-ske-cluster-nodepool | heavy-shared-dbaas | heavy-shared-networking
# heavy-shared-networking
